tests.details: 485 passed on 2026-04-20 after resolving the REM UI async-loop blocker, the standalone page-scaffold import blocker, the pre-1.0 dependency-range risk, and the default env-name reservation race

docs.details: docs/ has been unified into a single markdown tree; MkDocs static-site responsibility removed from this repo

lint.details: Maintained code and regular automated tests pass; historical manual/debug/verify/analyze scripts are explicitly excluded from the default lint gate

root_build.details: workspace build reran on 2026-04-29 and produced crawler4j-0.3.2 wheel/sdist successfully

sdk_build.details: current source version is crawler4j-sdk 0.6.1; no wheel/sdist or publish evidence has been recorded for this version yet. Historical 0.5.2 evidence must not be reused as current release evidence

contracts_build.details: current source version is crawler4j-contracts 0.4.0; no wheel/sdist or publish evidence has been recorded for this version yet. Historical 0.3.0 evidence must not be reused as current release evidence

root_script_entry.command: uv sync --all-packages && uv run python -m src.ui.app
root_script_entry.details: Workspace root no longer exposes a published start script; developers launch the app through the installed src.ui.app module

ui_smoke.details: Smoke passed on 2026-04-20; QApplication, Shell import, and Shell instantiation succeeded

pyinstaller_bundle.details: PyInstaller build passed on 2026-04-24 before the later QScintilla dependency line was introduced; current QScintilla package/bundle evidence is pending and must be rerun before release

external_packaged_module_smoke.command: Package external ctrip zip and install it through ModuleRegistry in an isolated app-data dir
external_packaged_module_smoke.details: Packaged external module install now loads from the installed app-data path and removes conflicting dev links

ctrip_labor_packaged_smoke.command: Install ctrip packaged module and run labor_workflow in isolated app-data dir
ctrip_labor_packaged_smoke.details: legacy automation compatibility imports are restored; packaged labor_workflow no longer degrades because src.automation is missing

mms_settings_store_tests.details: 4 passed on 2026-03-26 covering module/workflow settings export, removed legacy KV ignore semantics, persisted module status, and uninstall cleanup policy

mms_custom_ui_tests.details: 105 passed on 2026-04-22 covering hosted page renderer, module detail routing, runtime capabilities, declared UI persistence cleanup, CLI scaffold, integration, and acceptance on the new ui_extension.pages[] contract

known_risks: ctrip real-site E2E is still open for both DevLink and ZIP installation paths, so release gate remains No-Go.
The formal delivery batch still needs refreshed evidence binding after the Windows release pipeline landed.
Windows PyInstaller onedir + Velopack pipeline is now in repo, but the latest batch still lacks real Windows signing, install, and self-update records.
Latest local validation evidence is historical and must not be treated as a fresh full gate for the current dirty workspace.
QScintilla was added to the desktop dependency line after the last recorded PyInstaller package evidence, so desktop package/bundle verification is pending.
crawler4j-sdk 0.6.1 and crawler4j-contracts 0.4.0 still need current build/publish evidence if they are to be released.

technical_profile.title: Crawler4j Model 项目画像
technical_profile.stack: python + crawler4j-sdk CLI + crawler4j-contracts + core-native-v1 module project
technical_profile.summary: 适用于使用 crawler4j SDK CLI 创建和维护标准 model/模块项目，强调 `module.yaml`、`crawler4j-contracts` 运行时契约、CLI 脚手架、DevLink/ATM 调试和 zip 安装验收。
projects: Crawler4j Core 模块开发与验证
rules: 创建或补齐模块骨架时优先使用 `crawler4j module init`、`crawler4j task create`、`crawler4j workflow create`、`crawler4j page create`，不要先手写脚手架。
模块运行契约以 `module.yaml` 和模块根 `__init__.py` 为准，不把 wheel 元数据当成 Core 加载依据。
新增运行时依赖时，同时确认宿主 `crawler4j` 环境可用；不要只改模块项目 `pyproject.toml`。
调试与验收优先走 DevLink / ATM 调试与 zip 安装 smoke，避免依赖旧版临时调试脚本。
改动 SDK CLI、模板、模块契约或 Core 集成行为时，同时更新模块开发文档与回归测试。
commands: 优先执行 `uvx --from crawler4j-sdk crawler4j module init <module_name> --repo owner/<module_name>` 创建模块项目，默认使用 PyPI 最新发布版本；脚本化场景按需加 `--no-git --no-install`。
进入模块项目后优先执行 `uv run crawler4j task create <task_name>`、`uv run crawler4j workflow create <workflow_name>`、`uv run crawler4j page create <page_name>`。
在 crawler4j Core 源码仓验证本地 CLI 时，优先执行 `uv run python -m crawler4j_sdk.cli.commands --help`。
technical_profile.note: 移除固定版本并清理旧预设命令

stack: python + crawler4j-sdk CLI + crawler4j-contracts + core-native-v1 module project
